      Text

      Variant 1

      combine=0
      • Oath of the Ancients
      Your hunt would desecrate a sacred place - it ends here. As do you.
      ha09e19ddg84b4g4516g905fgf11a4ed0ede6 | ba52dc01-6a1a-4b90-930a-bd63d72b326d | stub

      Variant 2

      combine=0
      • Oath of Devotion
      Your fervour is impressive, but I'm afraid your hunt ends here.

      Variant 3

      combine=0
      • Oath of Vengeance
      Let me sate your appetite - you die here, True Soul.
      hbf334cf8g64e9g4285g9153g6b74e926056b | 00ef0067-8298-4d23-851d-30e0421414cb | stub

      Variant 4

      combine=0
      • Oathbreaker
      You are too beholden to zealotry, True Soul. I must end your hunt here.
      h663c87b4g5022g4e05g90f0gbf66bfea266f | 56ccda36-4aa4-4064-9e07-354f835fc94d | stub

      Variant 5

      combine=0
      • 7efcadc0-9e88-4d0a-87b9-64a589e2df91
      You will hunger no more - your crimes end here.
      h0a19701fg4d57g4b97gbfc8gac8169855f5d | 32ccfc19-7b26-42bd-bdd7-dafb5d744ed6 | stub

                                              74.Narrator: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon the Absolute seeks - it's the artefact that she carries. The same one that protected you as you entered the goblin camp.*note: Shadowheart steals a glance to Tav, her expression tight, apprehensive. The image of her undulates slightly - a mindmeld.Shadowheart

                                                                            125.Minthara: The last I sent did not return. Dead at the hands of those they seek, no doubt.

                                                                            Metadata

                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 436c20fd-7292-dad6-f348-07d72a74d60eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8127b32dg46a5g498cgb4adga69fec8c483eText UUID: 698cce77-28e9-e92e-e004-9a251de825a5Timeline Phase Index: 122Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 436c20fd-7292-dad6-f348-07d72a74d60eTimeline Phase Duration: 14.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [940.26s-945.52s] | @ 942.87s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [940.26s-945.52s] | @ 944.72s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [945.52s-950.75s] | @ 947.64s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [945.52s-950.75s] | @ 949.27s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [950.75s-954.46s] | @ 951.13s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [950.75s-954.46s] | @ 951.92s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [950.75s-954.46s] | @ 953.82s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [954.46s-960.37s] | @ 954.46s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Group ID: 436c20fd-7292-dad6-f348-07d72a74d60eGroup Index: 0
                                                                            • +
                                                                              207.Minthara: I would take greater pleasure in killing them myself than in sending them to die in the woods.

                                                                              Metadata

                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 68d7d1df-4d0a-d969-be05-0a3bd6edcfa4Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hbdf4bd7dg28a7g43afg81e4gadffa11c271bText UUID: 5b678c2a-fb9e-d6fe-c536-c27a10bcfddbGroup ID: 436c20fd-7292-dad6-f348-07d72a74d60eGroup Index: 1
                                                                              • •
                                                                                217.Minthara: And the occasional mass execution does wonders for discipline.

                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e000c22-15f6-b234-52da-991913a8e0caSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hbffa87fbg8916g4157gadcagb6a57150aa1eText UUID: fa640a0c-5cc6-1236-1303-275058074082Group ID: 436c20fd-7292-dad6-f348-07d72a74d60eGroup Index: 2
                                                                        • +

                                                                                                                      • Dragonborn
                                                                                                                      Battle must be conducted with honour. How can you prefer deception?

                                                                                                                                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 0adc99d2-79e9-efa3-bb98-a186fd728a7bJump Target: Node 232 (733a7f79-5a2b-1001-5cda-4e3642a9f945)Jump Target Point: 1
                                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                                    237.Player: I've done enough. The battle is yours to fight.

                                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 76131549-e4d6-ccc1-8047-f32264081708Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb357cca2g9c54g45ecg8160g5cd76a114848Text UUID: 080be68f-2bf1-7982-4992-3ddf4e20a3caShow Once: True
                                                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                                                      356.Minthara: I do not intend to lead a suicidal charge. The goblins are expendable; I am not.

                                                                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b6f51e1b-9b3f-ad75-a4ef-d3cfd53eb6bfSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h37cf1907ge9beg493ag9a3cg4b435b87da0dText UUID: 8bf9052b-04a9-cbe5-4c84-9d99bfc2816bTimeline Phase Index: 51Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b6f51e1b-9b3f-ad75-a4ef-d3cfd53eb6bfTimeline Phase Duration: 7.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [383.58s-388.7s] | @ 386.96s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 2 [388.7s-390.83s] | @ 389.25s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [390.85s-398.53s] | @ 390.85s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
                                                                                                                                      • +
                                                                                                                                        232.Minthara: The Absolute brought you here for a reason - to throw open those gates so we can crush our enemies.

                                                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 733a7f79-5a2b-1001-5cda-4e3642a9f945Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h3a621617gbcd5g485eg983aga25dcb977c16Text UUID: 1ef9d48a-ec85-dd53-2df4-1c0161adb1f6Timeline Phase Index: 28Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 733a7f79-5a2b-1001-5cda-4e3642a9f945Timeline Phase Duration: 6.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [209.44s-215.83s] | @ 211.98s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [209.44s-215.83s] | @ 213.8s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [216.33s-221.06s] | @ 216.33s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1
                                                                                                                                        • +

                                                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                                                            436.Minthara: Good. Marshalling the goblins is no simple matter, but my warband will be ready to attack by next light.

                                                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e892b030-0b31-3b2f-59f5-f0d8b1dd7588Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7ae21e6agce82g4f25g82e6g5a37b2f22130Text UUID: 9dec569a-7847-4cde-b79a-79a10d04aa35Timeline Phase Index: 32Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e892b030-0b31-3b2f-59f5-f0d8b1dd7588Timeline Phase Duration: 9.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [244.37s-254.03s] | @ 244.49s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [244.37s-254.03s] | @ 246.77s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [244.37s-254.03s] | @ 249.54s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [244.37s-254.03s] | @ 251.61s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [254.03s-262.79s] | @ 254.03s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)

                                                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                                                                              Node Type: AliasUUID: 16187abe-af07-375d-3c6e-5ce80f385bb5Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)
                                                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                                                292.Minthara: And when they are dead, the Absolute will reward your faith. As will I.

                                                                                                                                                Metadata

Can you provide safe passage?!GOB_DrowCommander_Quest_AskedAboutPassageGLO_Absolute_Knows_MoonriseTowersGOB_DrowCommander_Quest_AskedAboutPassage

                                                                                                                                          • •
                                                                                                                                            274.Minthara: Yes. I suppose I might offer you passage. But first you will raze the grove and honour our mistress.

                                                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8bce106b-fe6b-cb72-a3c4-48de7ff9eb46Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h87f06bb8g57b7g41e0gb658g83e7aa3407bfText UUID: 5d6c98c7-a810-4137-a8d1-658c0c54de4cTimeline Phase Index: 14Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8bce106b-fe6b-cb72-a3c4-48de7ff9eb46Timeline Phase Duration: 8.92sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [117.86s-126.07s] | @ 117.86s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [117.86s-126.07s] | @ 121.37s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [126.07s-126.78s] | @ 126.78s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)
                                                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                                                          22.Player: I have other business to attend to.

                                                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0b74ed38-e54f-1f07-9460-4c20f06e263fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hdfc8f390g7312g4082g8707ge5ca077a54d4Text UUID: 2f144b55-b08a-5b17-a510-2b5f9be8e105Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                          • •
                                                                                                                                            229.Minthara: Take care of it quickly. You are needed here, and my patience wears thin. [End]GOB_DrowCommander_Knows_MissionGOB_DrowCommander_State_ReadyToGo

                                                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                                                          85.Player: If I do this, I expect to be rewarded.

                                                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2d81fbb3-757d-8cb0-a370-5386e49e1679Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h98d2bee4g4b79g4d01gb610gd849a5b70532Text UUID: 31d63bc6-8622-c4cb-ba0e-ddf6d6027d18Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 97383d4d-2cdd-4b6f-8dfc-05645242b7ec
                                                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                                                            177.Minthara: You are honoured to serve a cause - a god. You will earn Her love, and the power that flows from that love.

                                                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5a9851cb-76b2-4908-c57f-77926ca88e51Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h6809e883gf382g4ba4gb984gb4eddb0cf6bdText UUID: 90df0d50-d747-e35e-a7c4-854c27c9782cTimeline Phase Index: 103Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5a9851cb-76b2-4908-c57f-77926ca88e51Timeline Phase Duration: 12.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [788.75s-794.04s] | @ 789.52s | peanut slot 2 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [788.75s-794.04s] | @ 789.54s | peanut slot 1 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [788.75s-794.04s] | @ 789.57s | peanut slot 0 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [788.75s-794.04s] | @ 791.35s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [788.75s-794.04s] | @ 792.93s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [798.04s-800.11s] | @ 798.33s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 4 [800.11s-800.82s] | @ 800.11s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 4 [800.11s-800.82s] | @ 800.46s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 4 [800.11s-800.82s] | @ 800.66s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 4 [800.11s-800.82s] | @ 800.78s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [800.82s-807.69s] | @ 800.82s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Group ID: 5a9851cb-76b2-4908-c57f-77926ca88e51Group Index: 0
                                                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                                                              198.Minthara: What greater reward could there be?

                                                                                                                                                • •
                                                                                                                                                  339.Minthara: We are servants of the one true god, not mercenaries.

                                                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ac2de97f-0d17-547b-f1bd-e1bbfee673ebSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7f8068a3gd960g4809g92bfge066192aff26Text UUID: b946c10e-d272-3885-0a1e-a9965169e3adTimeline Phase Index: 56Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ac2de97f-0d17-547b-f1bd-e1bbfee673ebTimeline Phase Duration: 4.11sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [426.24s-430.35s] | @ 428.88s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [430.35s-435.6s] | @ 430.35s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)
                                                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                                                224.Player: You're right. The Absolute's love is enough.9629c6c5-53c9-48c4-acb6-393e8b035174

                                                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                                                              Text

                                                                                                              Variant 1

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Oath of Devotion
                                                                                                              They are innocents, and on my oath, they are protected.
                                                                                                              hb10cccfag1150g4d3bgb5d2gae4ba4433cc4 | a45a3188-3566-4afa-8712-aad0ac52e1fc | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 2

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Oath of the Ancients
                                                                                                              The grove is a tranquil, ageless place. I will not let you desecrate it.
                                                                                                              h86a78ccagda2fg4f12ga31bg84e4c69dcdd7 | a7adfb9e-809f-4e99-94e5-8c4f7c9a6ac4 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 3

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Oath of Vengeance
                                                                                                              Because monsters like you can't be left to run amok.
                                                                                                              h80d3839dg5740g42e5gb44bgc7fb031c0086 | 58eb44c7-be44-4af6-b700-a49499b19995 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 4

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Oathbreaker
                                                                                                              You'd slaughter them on the whim of a capricious god. I find that... distasteful.
                                                                                                              h32b21ab3g445eg4a69g8d04g2a19703d67a4 | 2342201a-e19f-40b9-9e4b-cf25f8dc71df | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 5

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • 7efcadc0-9e88-4d0a-87b9-64a589e2df91
                                                                                                              Everyone is equal under the law. Everyone is due protection.
                                                                                                              h4d0e4975g2869g4d95g9bc0g87ae72a8fe3d | 49dd355e-33b3-4c5b-8baf-c49ff7123c0b | stub

                                                                      Metadata

                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a8e994e0-d760-84a6-753d-3ab5207234d6Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hecd0f0a5ga5fcg4795g8c8fg919817f6cf82Text UUID: 9786c215-ccd3-53ab-dae6-e6c2c1f0c2acTimeline Phase Index: 58Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a8e994e0-d760-84a6-753d-3ab5207234d6Timeline Phase Duration: 4.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [435.6s-440.4s] | @ 437.22s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [435.6s-440.4s] | @ 438.75s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)

                      272.Narrator: *The chamber melts away to reveal a dark, endless nowhere. In it, you see a vision - the drow listens as a pale-eyed young woman whispers in her ear.*note: mindmeld with Minthara as narrator describes vision of Minthara with Orin

                      Flags and Tags

                      tagstype node | speaker -666 Narrator
